title: Contains Duplicate III
hints: Notice the sliding window of size k+1. You only need to check elements currently inside this window against each other.
A balanced binary search tree or sorted set allows efficient insertion, deletion, and range queries within the window.
For each element, query if any value in the range [nums[i]-t, nums[i]+t] exists in the set before inserting nums[i]. Remove nums[i-k] when the window slides.
